global_description: A large seabird with a streamlined body, predominantly white with dark gray wings. It features a long, slender neck and a large, hooked bill. The wings are long and narrow, adapted for gliding over the ocean.

part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly white with a smooth texture.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, dark gray, adapted for gliding.

spatial_relations: The long narrow wings extend from the sides of the streamlined body.
The large hooked bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The long slender neck connects the head to the body.
